description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a light beige brick exterior and a prominent attached garage with a dark gray gable roof. The property is enclosed by a white fence and features a large green lawn at the rear, as well as a paved driveway and patio area at the front. The main building has a flat roof with multiple rectangular sections and several windows arranged in rows on the visible facades. The front of the house is accentuated by a covered porch supported by white columns, providing a sheltered entryway. The garage is set to one side, with its own driveway access and a sloped roof distinct from the main structure. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and a focus on practicality.
description: A modern two-story beige brick house with a flat roof, attached gable-roof garage, fenced yard, and a covered front porch with columns. The property includes a large green lawn and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch with columns, main entryway, paved driveway, and attached garage with a dark gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the garage's sloped roof, and the expansive green lawn enclosed by the white fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large backyard lawn, back entrance, and the rear facade with several windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage doors, paved area, and the side windows of the main house.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with white columns, steps leading to a central door, and a paved entry area.
